arts.ttl: I saw what Manchester United subs did that summed up seven minutes Old Trafford will never forget
arts.sum: Man United are into the Europa League semi-finals after one of the most astonishing nights of European football Old Trafford has ever witnessed.

arts.ttl: 'I didn't know what to do!' - Diogo Dalot unpicks late Manchester United madness vs Lyon
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot netted Man United's second goal in their pulsating 5-4 Europa League quarter-final win over Lyon at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: What Ruben Amorim told Manchester United players at half-time in extra time
arts.sum: Man United enjoyed an improbable comeback against Lyon in the Europa League on one of their greatest nights at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans remind Sir Jim Ratcliffe of their endearing value in Lyon miracle
arts.sum: Manchester United supporters helped roar the team onto victory in their Europa League clash at Old Trafford as they continue to be subjected to price hikes by the club's bosses

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim on Manchester United’s win over Lyon: ‘We can forget for a few moments the season that we are having.’
arts.sum: Manchester United’s season is still alive. Languishing in lower-mid table in the Premier League, all of their eggs are in the UEFA Europa League basket. The Red Devils got the…

arts.ttl: Paulo Fonseca explains Lyon’s meltdown against Manchester United
arts.sum: It was a game that was flipped on its head on more than one occasion. The scores were level as Olympique Lyonnais headed to Old Trafford in a bid to…

arts.ttl: Revealed: Two Man United players forced to leave Old Trafford at half-time due to urgent and unrelated family issues
arts.sum: Man United enjoyed one of the most dramatic nights in their European history as they overturned a 6-4 aggregate deficit against Lyon to reach the semi-finals of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: 'Three games from glory, Man Utd begin to show never-say-die DNA'
arts.sum: After their sensational Europa League comeback win over Lyon, Manchester United are just three games from a trophy in a comical season that could end in glory or embarrassment, writes Simon Stone.

arts.ttl: From ecstasy to misery: Alexandre Lacazette bids farewell to Europe for last time with Lyon
arts.sum: It was a night of emotional highs and lows for Alexandre Lacazette (33). Coming off the bench, the Olympique Lyonnais captain netted the penalty that sent his side 4-2 up…

arts.ttl: 'More than a miracle' - how Man Utd won in remarkable extra time
arts.sum: Manchester United complete a remarkable comeback against Lyon to reach the Europa League semi-finals.
